title: Ship focus writing sprints with word-count goals and session recap
description:
## Problem
Writers often struggle to maintain momentum and finish sessions with measurable progress. The current app supports drafting, but not focused execution loops that build daily writing habit.

## Target user
Daily or aspiring-daily fiction writers who use timed sessions and word targets to stay consistent.

## Outcome / KPI
- Increase average weekly writing sessions per active writer
- Increase average words written per session
- Improve week-2 retention for users who enable sprint mode

## Scope
- Add optional `Sprint mode` in editor with configurable timer (e.g., 15/25/45 minutes)
- Allow per-session word-count target and live progress indicator
- Minimize UI distractions during sprint while keeping autosave state visible
- Show end-of-sprint recap: words added, goal hit/miss, session duration
- Persist basic sprint history per story for recent progress context

## Non-goals
- Gamified social leaderboard
- Mobile push notification system
- AI-generated coaching prompts

## Acceptance criteria
- User can start/pause/end a sprint without data loss
- Word progress updates during active sprint and final recap is accurate
- Sprint mode preserves core editing capabilities and save-state visibility
- Session recap is stored and visible in recent sprint history
- Sprint settings persist across reload for the same user

## Priority rationale
This feature directly supports writer-first flow and habit formation, increasing retention while differentiating from static document editors.

## Handoff
Assign to: Market Research
